Scenario: Verify existing Account has Billing Address and Payment Terms on Details tab
Expected Result: Both fields visible; soft-fail warning logged if blank or absent without failing the suite

Scenario: Create new Contact via direct URL navigation and link to Account
Expected Result: Contact saved; URL contains /Contact/; Contact last name visible on record page

Scenario: Create Opportunity linked to Account and verify Contact Primary Contact Role in Related tab
Expected Result: Opportunity URL contains /Opportunity/; Contact name appears in Contact Roles section

Scenario: Create Quote from Opportunity, browse catalog to select Price Book, add product, save, accept Quote, and initiate Contract creation
Expected Result: Quote has product on line items; status set to Accepted; Contract creation dialog completed with None option

Scenario: Activate Contract with term filled, create single Order from Quote, open Order, and activate it
Expected Result: Contract shows Activated status; Order created and URL contains /Order/; Order shows Activated status
